items.definition_en: A raincoat is a coat that keeps you dry in the rain.
items.example_en: She wore a yellow raincoat during the storm.

items.definition_en: Leggings are tight-fitting trousers made of stretchy material.
items.example_en: She likes to wear leggings to the gym.

items.definition_en: A cardigan is a knitted sweater that opens at the front.
items.example_en: He put on a cardigan to stay warm in the office.

items.definition_en: Overalls are a piece of clothing that covers the body and has straps over the shoulders.
items.example_en: Farmers often wear overalls when they work.

items.definition_en: A tank top is a sleeveless shirt with shoulder straps.
items.example_en: He wore a tank top on the hot day.

items.definition_en: Flip-flops are simple sandals with a thong between the toes.
items.example_en: She wore flip-flops to the beach.

items.definition_en: A tracksuit is a set of loose clothes for sports or exercise.
items.example_en: He changed into his tracksuit before jogging.

items.definition_en: Mittens are gloves that cover the hand but not the fingers separately.
items.example_en: She bought warm mittens for winter.

items.definition_en: A bikini is a two-piece swimsuit for women.
items.example_en: She wore a red bikini to the pool.

items.definition_en: A waistcoat is a sleeveless garment worn over a shirt and under a jacket.
items.example_en: He wore a waistcoat with his suit.

items.definition_en: Rain boots are waterproof boots worn in wet weather.
items.example_en: Children love to jump in puddles with rain boots.

items.definition_en: A swimsuit is clothing worn for swimming.
items.example_en: He packed a swimsuit for the vacation.

items.definition_en: Pajamas are clothes worn for sleeping.
items.example_en: He changed into pajamas before bed.

items.definition_en: A purse is a small bag for carrying money and personal items.
items.example_en: She found her keys inside her purse.

items.definition_en: A handbag is a large purse carried by women.
items.example_en: She placed her handbag on the chair.

items.definition_en: A trench coat is a long, stylish coat often worn in the rain.
items.example_en: He wore a classic trench coat to work.

items.definition_en: A beanie is a small, tight hat made from knitted wool.
items.example_en: He put on a beanie to stay warm.

items.definition_en: An overcoat is a heavy coat worn outdoors in cold weather.
items.example_en: He wore a thick overcoat in January.

items.definition_en: Ballet flats are flat shoes inspired by ballet slippers.
items.example_en: She prefers ballet flats for comfort.

items.definition_en: Trousers are a piece of clothing that covers each leg separately.
items.example_en: He bought a new pair of trousers.
